articles.title: Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (July 15)
articles.description:
ABINGTON 74 Crabtree Lane. One-family Colonial, built in 2004, 4,232 square feet, 10 rooms, 4 bedrooms, 3 baths, on 171,172-square-foot lot. $1,380,000 38 Old Farm Road. One-family Colonial, built in 1995, 3,540 square feet, 10 rooms, 5 bedrooms, 4 baths, on 29,602-square-foot lot. $1,225,000 710 Linwood St. One-family Colonial, built in 2007, 2,880 square feet, […]

The post Recent homes sales in Greater Boston (July 15) appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Abington home at 74 Crabtree Lane sold for $1.38 million on July 15.
38 Old Farm Road sold for $1.225 million, featuring 5 bedrooms and 4 baths.
Recent sales indicate a competitive housing market in Greater Boston, affecting local buyers.
